ideation: This sequence aims to express mild disappointment or sadness through subtle arm movements. The robot will slightly lower its arms and turn its palms inward, conveying a sense of dejection.  In the first frame, both arms start in a neutral, resting position at the sides, with joint1 at 0.0 and joint2 at -90.0. The wrists are also at 0.0, keeping the palms facing inward. This represents a default, relaxed posture.  In the second frame, both arms lower slightly, with joint2 adjusting to -80.0. This subtle downward movement suggests a decrease in energy or enthusiasm. The wrists rotate slightly inward to -20.0, adding to the sense of closure or sadness.  In the third frame, the arms move slightly further down, with joint2 now at -70.0. This continues the downward trend, emphasizing the feeling of disappointment.  The wrists rotate further inward to -40.0, enhancing the sense of inward reflection or sadness. The subtle changes in arm and wrist position across the frames create a natural progression of the emotion, avoiding any sudden or jerky movements.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, neutral and still
arms lower slightly, palms turn inward a bit
arms sink further, a subtle expression of sadness
